items.title: Aaronson gets married amid USMNT WCup camp
items.summary: Brenden Aaronson made a swift exit at his own wedding to return to the United States men's national team's World Cup training camp.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Shnaider stuns No. 1 Sabalenka at French Open
items.summary: Top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka, up a set and two breaks in the second, suffered a shocking defeat in three sets to Diana Shnaider in the French Open quarterfinals on Wednesday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 2026 NFL Offseason: Ranking The Top 10 Moves After Myles Garrett, A.J. Brown Trades
items.summary: Between trades, signings and hires, it's been a wild NFL offseason. So, we ranked the top 10 moves of the spring and summer following Monday's major trades.
